params_used.custom_text: // This module provides a synchronous block RAM with a 10-bit address space and 12-bit wide data lines. It supports reading from and writing to the memory based on the 'wea' signal. When 'wea' is high, it writes the input data 'dina' to the specified address 'addra' on the rising edge of the clock 'clka'. If 'wea' is low, it reads the data stored at 'addra' into the output 'douta'.
